Short CV

Zeynep Gümüş Demir was graduated from Gazi Osman Paşa University, “Nursing” Department in 2004. She completed her master’s degree in "Applied Psychology" at Üsküdar University in 2014 and her Ph.D. degree in "Clinical Psychology" at Doğuş University in 2020. She started working in Uskudar University in 2013 and has been continuing to work as an assistant professor in the department of psychology.
